notes: GR50 ranges are split into min, max, and average values for filtering.
Shoot/root ion columns are split into separate numeric fields.
Asterisks from the source are stored as secretion_marker_present instead of being kept in numeric values.
This dataset is prepared for dictionary search and frontend/backend filtering; it is also ML-ready for the next phase.

fields.id: Stable slug identifier generated from scientific name.
fields.species_full_name: Scientific name with common name in parentheses.
fields.common_name: Common grass name from the source.
fields.is_salt_secreting: Boolean convenience field for frontend filters.
fields.salt_tolerance_level: Computed class based on GR50 average: Low <10, Moderate 10-19.99, High 20-39.99, Very High >=40.
fields.na_shoot_mmol_kg_dw: Na+ shoot content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.na_root_mmol_kg_dw: Na+ root content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.cl_shoot_mmol_kg_dw: Cl− shoot content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.cl_root_mmol_kg_dw: Cl− root content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.k_shoot_mmol_kg_dw: K+ shoot content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.k_root_mmol_kg_dw: K+ root content in mmol Kg-1 Tissue DW.
fields.search_text: Lowercase concatenated search field for quick frontend search.
